title: BulSU Multi-Level E-Library System
description: A Database Design and GUI Application for Bulacan State University featuring multi-level access, borrowing, and reservation capabilities.
bullets: Designed a full-scale Library Management Application using Java Swing and SQL Server
Implemented a reservation system for function halls
Established a book and patron management system

title: Scholarship Management System
description: An interactive web-based system for managing scholarships with separate admin and student views.
bullets: Used MySQL, PHP, jQuery to establish an interactive website
Collaborated with multidisciplinary team to create admin and student views
